# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

apiGateways:
  api-gateway:
    hosts:
      - host: api-gateway.example.com
        ports:
          http: 80
          https: 443
    tls_certs:
      certificate: cert.pem
      key: key.pem
    services:
      - name: service1
        url: http://service1:8080/api
      - name: service2
        url: http://service2:8081/api
    plugins:
      - id: access-key-auth
        service_id: service1
        strip_path: true
        access_keys:
          - key: abcdefg123456
            secret: mysecret123
      - id: basic-auth
        service_id: service2
        strip_path: true
        credentials:
          - user: admin
            password: password123
    routes:
      - name: route1
        paths:
          - /v1/resource1/*
        service_id: service1
        strip_prefix: true
      - name: route2
        paths:
          - /v1/resource2/*
        service_id: service2
        strip_prefix: true
